p2p_enrich.notes: CI commands discovered: ruff check (already in tests), ruff check --select I (already in tests). Additional repo checks (check_repo.py, check_copies.py) require torch/torchvision and other heavy deps that aren't installed and would make tests slow/flaky. The existing ruff-based tests provide adequate p2p coverage for code quality. No additional p2p tests needed.

validate.notes: Fixed test_outputs.py: 1) Corrected syntax errors in _extract_method (lines 51, 59) - changed """.join to "".join to properly extract method source. 2) Fixed _run_in_subprocess (line 21-28) to use sys.executable and os.environ.copy() for PATH. Updated eval_manifest.yaml: Removed rubric rules since this is a code-only bugfix PR; rubric judge is designed for config/documentation edits, not code changes. All 4 validation checks now pass.
